falsification.leakage_hunt: too-good or promoted claims are failed unless controls are present and clean; diagnostic/non-promoted claims are reported but not promoted
falsification.preregistered_failure_condition: any promoted q-space conditional/template win missing mean-template, shuffled-target, run/key-overlap, or no-run/event-feature controls

finding: The P10e control schema is reproducible from committed artifacts, and the deterministic linter finds no current promoted q-space conditional/template claim that lacks the required clean controls.

ml.task: advisory detection of control-complete P10/P-template result schemas

reproduction.reason_no_raw_root: ticket explicitly says use existing reports only; the object under test is result.json/report schema enforcement

split: report-corpus scan; held-out report bootstrap for advisory ML, not event/run ROOT split
ticket_body: Question: can a lightweight report linter scan future P10/P-template result.json files and fail any claimed q-space conditional-template win unless mean-template, shuffled-target, run/key-overlap, and no-run/event-feature controls are present and clean? Expected information gain: makes the P10e registry enforceable at summary-building time. Use existing reports only; no Monte Carlo.
title: automatic conditional-template claim linter

traditional.metric: number of promoted q-space conditional/template claims failing required controls
